headline: WILLIAMS-SONOMA, INC. LAUNCHES DORMIFY
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 27, 2026--Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE: WSM), the world’s largest digital-first, design-led and sustainable home retailer, announced today the launch of the company’s tenth brand, Dormify. Designed to meet the evolving needs of students and young consumers navigating dormitories and compact living environments, Dormify offers a curated, modern assortment of stylish and highly functional home furnishings.
